name: Rajesh Kathirvel
company: Aggregate Intelligence India Pvt. Ltd., Coimbatore

internship.title: Software Engineering Intern
internship.company: Aggregate Intelligence India Pvt. Ltd., Coimbatore

about:
Hi! I'm Rajesh Kathirvel, a Software Engineer and recent B.Tech graduate in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science from Al-Ameen Engineering College, Erode (2022-2026). I completed my internship at Aggregate Intelligence India Private Limited, Coimbatore from October 2025 to June 2026 and was subsequently onboarded as a Junior Software Engineer in the Research & Development Team.

My work focuses on AI application development, Agentic AI systems, prompt engineering, and building intelligent solutions powered by Large Language Models. I have hands-on experience working with OpenAI APIs, AI-driven workflows, software development, project management systems, and modern AI product development practices. I am passionate about building scalable AI applications, automating complex workflows, and creating intelligent solutions that solve real-world business challenges.

I continuously explore emerging AI technologies and enjoy transforming ideas into practical, production-ready applications that deliver measurable value.

projects.title: Startup Company Prediction
projects.description: A machine learning predictive model developed to analyze and project the success rate of startup companies based on multiple industry data points.

projects.title: Text Sentiment Analysis
projects.description: An NLP-based sentiment analysis engine that processes textual input and predicts the emotional sentiment of user texts in real-time.

projects.title: Voice-Text Sentiment Analysis
projects.description: A dual-input emotional and sentiment analysis tool that interprets both audio recording inputs and typed text inputs to predict user sentiment.

projects.title: Fake News Detection
projects.description: A web-based NLP utility powered by Machine Learning classifiers to inspect news articles and detect fabricated information or fake news.

projects.title: AI Tech Trend Web Scraper
projects.description: An automated web scraping application designed to search, extract, and catalog news articles and trends specifically in Artificial Intelligence from the web.
